ruleBookInfo.author: author
ruleBookInfo.init:
var J = org.jsoup.Jsoup.parse(result); var og = (selector) => String(J.select('[property="og:' + selector + '"]').attr('content')); var book = { name: og('novel:book_name').replace(/(全文|小说|免费|最新章节).*|（.*）/,''), author: og('novel:author'), kind: og('novel:category') + ',' + og('novel:status').replace(/中|已/,''), latest: J.select('.bookcover p').eq(4).text(), cover: og('image'), wordCount: parseInt(J.select('.num').eq(0).text().replace('字','')/10000)+'万', intro: '
最近更新：' + og('novel:update_time').replace(/\s.*/,'') + '\n' + String(J.select('.con').html()).replace(/.*简介：|各位书友.*/,'').replace(/\s+/g,'
'), url: og('novel:read_url').replace('m.','www.'), }; book;
ruleBookInfo.name: name
